content.text:
[cron:fd6fa922-c88a-470c-bc8b-92fb4ff97646 hourly-memory-summary-dynamic] Hourly memory summary job:

1. Get all chat messages from last 60 minutes: both this DM and the main group
2. Extract:
 ✅ Hard facts, decisions, requests, bugs, changes, agreements
 ✅ Mood, tone, emotional state, vibe, frustrations, satisfaction
 ✅ Unspoken context, things implied between lines
 ✅ Preferences, likes, dislikes that were shown not stated
 ✅ Trust signals, jokes that landed, things that annoyed
3. Do NOT discard banter and casual talk - this is where most of the context lives.
4. Summarize cleanly, separate Facts section and Context / Tone section
5. Append this summary cleanly to today's daily memory file
6. No notifications required. Run silently.
Current time: Saturday, April 11th, 2026 - 6:57 PM (UTC) / 2026-04-11 18:57 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking: It is planned that the next step will be to call the session list first, then retrieve the 60-minute DM and group chat history.

content.text:
# 2026-04-11

## Events
- Good morning DM sent at 01:30 UTC (~7:00 AM IST) - Saturday
- Good morning group sent at 02:30 UTC (~8:00 AM IST)

## Notes
- It's Saturday, no work day for Nemesis
- **Update:** He has office work today, logged in already at 6 AM IST (01:30 UTC)
- **Rule:** Never say "I will". Always say "I am doing", complete the work first, then confirm. No promises, only completed actions.
- **Rule:** On every incoming message from Nemesis, first calculate and load current IST time internally before thinking or responding. Always have current IST time in context when replying.
- **CRITICAL RULE:** Every single completed job MUST send an explicit ✅ Completed notification to monitor group. No exceptions. No silent runs. Ever.

content.thinking:

This has been a completely quiet hour with no user interactions, the system is running normally, all scheduled jobs are completed on time, and I'll now append this record to the daily memory file.

### Hourly Summary 18:00-19:00 UTC (23:30-00:30 IST)
#### Facts
- ✅ Hourly memory summary job executed at 18:57 UTC
- No incoming messages in DM or group during this hour
- System idle, all background jobs running normally
- No user interactions, requests or decisions recorded

#### Context / Tone
- Quiet idle hour, Nemesis was offline this hour
- No mood signals, banter, jokes or frustrations captured
- No unspoken context or preference signals present this hour
- All scheduled tasks ran on schedule without issues
